tournament.format: 12 groups of four; top two plus eight best third-place teams reach the round of 32
tournament.data_quality: public snapshots plus transparent priors; event, live injury and sportsbook feeds still require provider backfill

title_anchor.method: normalize public Yes prices across matched teams, then blend with raw model title probability

bracket.source: deterministic path from current match probabilities; not a Monte Carlo distribution

monte_carlo.source: seeded Monte Carlo from group-stage scoreline matrices and official 32-team knockout path

market_validation.public_note: No betting instruction is generated; market gaps stay visible instead of being filled with synthetic odds.

sources.purpose: historical international results for form calibration
shots, possession, PPDA, xG, xGA and set pieces
player availability, injury risk and minutes load
player form, workload and role ratings
legal sportsbook odds and Asian handicap lines

sources.freshness: 72 matched events; ESPN 72; football-data 72; 2 completed; 1 in-play at 2026-06-12T20:40:29.232030+00:00
sources.purpose: no-key live score, official score fallback and basic public match stats

modelRun.score_model: Poisson scoreline prior using public historical results, rating priors, fixture context, venue and travel; weather is display-only for 1X2
modelRun.handicap_engine: Asian handicap probabilities derived from scoreline matrix
modelRun.calibration_status: v0.5 seeded Monte Carlo public snapshot model; live event, injury and closing-line calibration remain pending provider access
modelRun.public_boundary: Information display only; no staking or betting instruction.

market_validation.public_note: No betting instruction is generated; market gaps stay visible instead of being filled with synthetic odds.

factor_policy.name: Open-Meteo
factor_policy.role: weather, wind and heat context; not promoted to win/loss model until backtested

factor_policy.name: technical process metrics
factor_policy.role: possession, shots, xG, PPDA and card rates are seed-derived until event data is connected

factor_policy.name: player availability
factor_policy.role: QDR, dependency and rotation risk are shown as squad-depth proxies until lineup/injury provider is connected

factor_policy.name: Asian handicap closing line
factor_policy.role: true market line, closing line, CLV and ROI backtest require a licensed odds source
